title: gibbaeum pilosulum
intro: Gibbaeum pilosulum, also known as the 'hairy button plant', is a small succulent species belonging to the family Aizoaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant is believed to possess health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential healing effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the Gibbaeum pilosulum are often used to create infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for internal and external use, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
